{{- /* Resolve the theme before first paint (no flash). Stored preference wins; otherwise follow the OS. Dark-first fallback. Kept inline + blocking so the data-theme attribute is set before the stylesheet applies. */ -}} {{- $title := .Title -}} {{- $siteTitle := site.Title -}} {{- if .IsHome -}} {{ $siteTitle }} {{- else -}} {{ $title }} · {{ $siteTitle }} {{- end }} {{- /* Preload the most-used self-hosted weights (body 400, headings 600). Fonts are fetched in anonymous CORS mode, so the preload needs crossorigin to match - otherwise the browser fetches them twice. */ -}} {{ $tokens := resources.Get "css/tokens.css" }} {{ $docs := resources.Get "css/docs.css" }} {{ $searchcss := resources.Get "css/search.css" }} {{ $css := slice $tokens $docs $searchcss | resources.Concat "css/app.css" | minify | fingerprint }} {{- /* App JS: Fuse.js + the search controller + theme behavior (nav drawer, dark/light toggle, TOC scrollspy) concatenated into one deferred, fingerprinted bundle (same Pipes pattern as the CSS above). The no-flash theme resolver above stays inline and blocking; everything else defers. */ -}} {{ $fuse := resources.Get "js/vendor/fuse.min.js" }} {{ $searchjs := resources.Get "js/search.js" }} {{ $themejs := resources.Get "js/theme.js" }} {{ $js := slice $fuse $searchjs $themejs | resources.Concat "js/app.js" | minify | fingerprint }}
